author: Alex Nicoll
title: KKR's $1.4 billion sports bet started with a decade-old relationship
description: The story of KKR's acquisition of Arctos Partners began years before the firm was founded, when one founder impressed KKR as a deal counterparty.
content:
L.A. Dodgers celebrate their 2024 World Series win.Elsa/Getty Images
  • In February, KKR bought sports investing experts Arctos Partners for $1.4 billion.
